description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black and metallic finish, accented by some brownish elements on the stock and fore-end. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a vented heat shield and a prominent under-barrel attachment, likely a tactical accessory or secondary device. The stock is compact and angular, with a pistol grip for improved handling and control. The receiver area includes visible mechanical details, such as a bolt and ejection port, and the trigger guard is rounded and reinforced. Overall, the shotgun exudes a sense of durability and readiness for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A tactical, compact shotgun with a matte black and metallic finish, featuring a short barrel, pistol grip, and robust under-barrel attachment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, stock, pistol grip, and under-barrel attachment clearly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the width of the under-barrel attachment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, receiver details, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented heat shield and short, thick profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with reinforced edges
